text:
On Tue, 05 Jan 1999 16:06:29 PST, Satoshi Asami wrote:

>  Also, imake has its own way with dealing with CFLAGS, in a way that

Yeah, I think I was struggling from a little paradigm schizophrenia
before.

PR9331 and PR9329 can be closed, but PR9330 still applies.

Ciao,
Sheldon.
